image_list.open_create_strategy: click visible outer-page or content-frame entry whose text matches 发表图文/发表动态/发布图文; never use plain 发表 because that is the final publish boundary

ready_checks: text input placeholder contains 22 or title
scheduled publish radio group is visible

upload.verification: img.slider-img count equals uploaded image count

description.topic_strategy: type #tag then press Enter after each tag

collection.selection_policy: choose a broad matching collection; if no broad match exists, return needs_human to create or confirm a new collection

music.observed_default: first recommended music can already be selected

activity.default_policy: leave as not participating unless draft plan requests otherwise

schedule.default_policy: use immediate publish unless draft plan contains publish_at

upload.method: CDP DOM.setFileInputFiles after locating video input

description.label: 视频描述
description.topic_strategy: type #tag then press Enter after each tag

original_declaration.label: 声明原创
original_declaration.policy: requires explicit plan or user confirmation before enabling

known_risks: Do not run multiple real inspections against the same persistent Chrome profile in parallel; the profile lock closes one browser.
Scan visible matching nodes instead of clicking the first selector match, because hidden template nodes can appear before real controls.
Screenshots and DOM snapshots are local diagnostics and may contain account display text; do not upload them to shared logs without review.
